headline: Is It Too Late To Consider BNY After Multi Year 7x Returns?
summary: If you are wondering whether Bank of New York Mellon Corporation (BNY) still offers value after a strong run, this article will walk through how its current share price stacks up against a range of valuation checks. BNY closed at US$119.10, with returns of 0.8% over 7 days, a 0.7% decline over 30 days, 1.8% year to date, 36.7% over 1 year and a very large 3 year and 5 year return that both exceed 7x, which raises fair questions about future upside and risk. Recent coverage around BNY has...
